docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE AND TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO SUBMINT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY HOWITT, ZACHARY WESTON WILLINGHAM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2024 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-08-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-29-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-29-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ZACHARY HOWITT IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT WILLINGHAM WESTON IS NOT PRESENT. CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWITT, ZACHARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WESTON WILLINGHAM $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,140.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HOWITT, ZACHARY AS TO DEFENDANT WESTON WILLINGHAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $65 SERVED JAN-09-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WESTON WILLINGHAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF ZACHARY HOWITT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLINGHAM WESTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
